query: SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN teamAId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_teamA, SUM(CASE WHEN teamBId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_teamB FROM games GROUP BY phase ORDER BY phase LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2wStqi96Bwp1QsN.a3b8e3def1a1 --database dJv8mGehu4r2vn8N2SWpLW --execute 
SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN teamAId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_teamA, SUM(CASE WHEN teamBId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_teamB FROM games GROUP BY phase ORDER BY phase LIMIT 20;
